app.admin.assessment.domainContext.conte: Forneça os detalhes básicos desta avaliação.
app.admin.assessment.domainContext.descr: Describe the site conditions, species mix, and restoration or production goals.
Describe the training program, target audience, and learning objectives.
Describe the energy access situation, infrastructure being deployed, and target community.
Describe the waste stream, collection infrastructure, and target outcomes.
What land area and species are being assessed? What ecological or agricultural challenge does this address?
What training or educational program is being assessed? Who are the learners and what skills are targeted?
What solar energy challenge is being addressed? What scale of deployment is involved and who benefits?
What waste management challenge is being tracked? What materials and community are involved?
app.admin.assessment.domainContext.locat: e.g., Alto Paraíso, Goiás — Farm cooperative lot 3
e.g., Medellín, Colombia — Community learning center
e.g., Kigali, Rwanda — Sector 5 hub network
e.g., Dharavi, Mumbai — Mithi River corridor (2km stretch)
app.admin.assessment.domainContext.title: e.g., Cerrado Reforestation — Q1 Planting Assessment
e.g., Field Worker Training — Solar Maintenance Certification
e.g., Kigali Community Solar — Phase 2 Deployment
e.g., Dharavi Riverbank Cleanup — Monthly Impact Review
app.admin.assessment.sdgHarvest.harvestD: Set the reporting period for work aggregation into hypercerts.
app.admin.assessment.sdgHarvest.sdgDescr: Select the UN Sustainable Development Goals this assessment aligns with.
app.admin.assessment.shared.diagnosisMin: Provide a root-cause diagnosis (at least 10 characters)

app.admin.assessment.shared.selectSdg: Select at least one SDG target
app.admin.assessment.shared.smartOutcome: Add at least one SMART outcome
app.admin.assessment.shared.targetPositi: Target must be a positive number
app.admin.assessment.strategyKernel.cyne: Chaotic
No cause-effect. Act first, novel practice required.
Clear
Known knowns. Best practices apply, cause-effect obvious.
Complex
Unknown unknowns. Safe-to-fail probes, emergent practice.
Complicated
Known unknowns. Expert analysis needed, multiple right answers.
Cynefin phase: {phase}
Classify the complexity of the operating environment.
Post-fire restoration with no baseline data and active erosion.
Emergency response training during active crisis with shifting needs.
Emergency solar deployment after natural disaster, no infrastructure baseline.
Waste crisis response with no existing infrastructure or baseline data.
Monoculture planting with established nursery stock and known survival rates.
Standardized curriculum with certified instructors and known pass rates.
Standard rooftop installation with proven equipment and trained installers.
Established collection routes with trained sorters and known buyer network.
Restoration of degraded land with unknown seed bank and variable rainfall.
Community-led learning with variable literacy and no prior baseline.
First off-grid deployment in region with unknown demand patterns.
New upcycling program with unknown community adoption patterns.
Multi-species agroforestry design requiring soil analysis and spacing models.
Custom training for multiple skill levels requiring needs assessment.
Grid-tied system requiring utility negotiations and custom inverter sizing.
Multi-stream sorting requiring material analysis and market research.
Cynefin Phase
app.admin.assessment.strategyKernel.desc: Provide context and goals for this assessment.
app.admin.assessment.strategyKernel.diag: Root-cause analysis of the challenge being addressed.
What land degradation, biodiversity loss, or agricultural challenge are you addressing?
What knowledge or skills gap exists? What are the consequences of not addressing it?
What energy access gap or infrastructure challenge are you addressing? What are the root causes?
What waste accumulation or management gap are you addressing? What are the root causes?
Describe the core challenge and its root causes...
e.g., Degraded pastureland from cattle overgrazing has reduced soil organic matter to <1%. Native species corridors are fragmented, limiting pollinator pathways...
e.g., Field operators lack standardized training on solar panel maintenance, leading to 35% system degradation in year 1. Knowledge transfer relies on informal peer learning...
e.g., Rural households in Sector 5 rely on diesel generators averaging 4 hours daily. High fuel cost ($12/week) limits productive electricity use and creates indoor health risks...
e.g., Unmanaged plastic waste accumulates along 2km of riverbank at 500kg/week. No formal collection infrastructure exists. Local informal recyclers recover <10% of recyclables...
app.admin.assessment.strategyKernel.sect: Define the challenge, outcomes, and complexity context for this assessment.
app.admin.assessment.strategyKernel.smar: e.g., Plant 200 native species seedlings across 5 hectares
e.g., Train 30 field operators to maintenance certification level
e.g., Generate 500 kWh/month from newly installed panels
e.g., Divert 2 tonnes of recyclable waste from landfill per month
Define measurable targets. Each outcome needs a description, metric, and target value.
app.admin.assessment.strategyKernel.titl: Summarise this assessment in a few words.

app.profile.claimOffline: Não é possível reivindicar enquanto offline
app.profile.gardenerRoleDescription: Entre como Jardineiro para enviar trabalho neste jardim.
app.profile.help.faq.dataStorage.answer: As atestações de trabalho são publicadas onchain via EAS. Mídia e rascunhos são armazenados localmente enquanto estiver offline e enviados quando voltar a ficar online.
app.profile.help.faq.duplicateHandling.a: Uma detecção básica evita duplicados óbvios (por exemplo, envios semelhantes em uma janela curta de tempo) para manter os dados limpos.
app.profile.help.faq.gardensAndOperators: Jardins são projetos ou locais onde o impacto é medido. Operadores gerenciam um jardim e revisam/aprovam os envios. Jardineiros contribuem trabalho enviando evidências de impacto.
O que são jardins e operadores?
Selecione um jardim e uma ação, adicione detalhes e mídia. Se estiver offline, o app salva seu trabalho localmente e o coloca na fila. Quando voltar a ficar online, a mídia é enviada e seu trabalho é atestado onchain via EAS. Em seguida, os operadores revisam e aprovam ou rejeitam.
app.profile.help.faq.howToBringImpactOnc: Você pode levar o impacto para a blockchain criando uma avaliação de jardim e enviando-a para o EAS do Green Goods.
Como posso levar o impacto para a blockchain?
app.profile.help.faq.howToContact.answer: Você pode entrar em contato com Green Goods enviando um email para greengoods@greenpill.builders.
app.profile.help.faq.howToContact.questi: Como posso entrar em contato com Green Goods?
app.profile.help.faq.howToGetInvolved.an: Você pode se envolver com Green Goods criando uma avaliação de jardim, participando da comunidade e compartilhando seu conhecimento e experiência.
app.profile.help.faq.howToGetInvolved.qu: Como posso me envolver com Green Goods?
app.profile.help.faq.howToLearnMore.answ: Você pode aprender mais sobre Green Goods visitando nosso site, participando do nosso servidor Discord e nos seguindo nas redes sociais.
app.profile.help.faq.howToLearnMore.ques: Como posso aprender mais sobre Green Goods?
app.profile.help.faq.offlineSupport.answ: Sim. Se você estiver offline, seu trabalho é salvo localmente no seu dispositivo e sincroniza automaticamente quando voltar a ficar online.
app.profile.help.faq.smartAccountAddress: Seu perfil exibe um endereço de conta inteligente usado para envios e aprovações. Você também pode vincular sua carteira regular (EOA).
Qual é o meu endereço de conta inteligente?
app.profile.help.faq.whatIsEAS.answer: EAS significa Ethereum Attestation Service. É um serviço que permite enviar e verificar dados na blockchain Ethereum.
app.profile.help.faq.whatIsEAS.question: O que é EAS?
app.profile.help.faq.whatIsGreenGoods.an: Green Goods é uma plataforma que permite levar o impacto para a blockchain.
app.profile.help.faq.whatIsImpact.answer: O impacto é a variedade de vida na Terra. Inclui todos os organismos vivos, desde plantas e animais até fungos e bactérias.
app.profile.help.faq.whoCanSubmitWork.an: Qualquer pessoa pode enviar trabalho de jardim para o EAS do Green Goods. Você não precisa ser um jardineiro profissional para participar.
app.profile.help.faq.whoCanSubmitWork.qu: Quem pode enviar trabalho de jardim?
